subject: fix(theme): fix double opacity modifiers and stale bg-errorBg class
body:
Audit found 4 issues from the className migration batch:

1. Double opacity modifiers in BubbleContent.tsx and ChatListItem.tsx:
   `text-textSecondary/70` was replaced to `text-base-content/70/70`
   because the batch replaced `text-textSecondary` → `text-base-content/70`
   without accounting for existing Tailwind opacity suffixes.
   Fixed: /70/70 → /50 (compound 0.7*0.7), /70/60 → /40 (compound 0.7*0.6)

2. Stale `bg-errorBg` className in join/index.tsx and join/[code].tsx:
   This was a custom color from the old tailwind.config.js that wasn't
   in the replacement batch list. Replaced with inline style using
   withAlpha(colors.error, 0.1) for theme-aware error backgrounds.

Tags: theme, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-system
Semver: patch
